---
title: "IST kernel"
author: "Stephen Agyeah"
date: "2026-04-05"
output: html_document
---




```{r}
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

# S Beta C UNIFORM 
plot_data_beta_unif <- read_csv("ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_CUNIFORM_SBeta_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv")

# S GAMMA C GAMMA
plot_data_gamma_gamma <- read_csv("ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv")

# S norm C beta
plot_data_norm_beta <- read_csv("ISTKernel_ALL_plot_data_Snorm_Cbeta_rho_n_baseS_withSD.csv")



```





# S = Beta
# C = Uniform

## with socially desirabitlity


```{r}

plot_data_beta_unif$n <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$n,
  levels = c(100, 500),
  labels = c("n = 100", "n = 500")
)

plot_data_beta_unif$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_beta_unif$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("rho == -0.5", "rho == 0", "rho == 0.5")
)

plot_data_beta_unif$maxc <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$maxc,
  levels = c(0.1, 0.25, 0.5)
)

plot_data_beta_unif$C_label <- factor(
  paste0("b = ", plot_data_beta_unif$maxc)
)

# rename legend labels
plot_data_beta_unif$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_beta_unif$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_beta_unif$p1)) {
  for (nn in levels(plot_data_beta_unif$n)) {

    pd <- subset(plot_data_beta_unif, p1 == pp & n == nn)

    # Bias
    bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Bias",
        color = ""
      )

    print(bias_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = bias_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
    )

    # Variance
    var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Variance",
        color = ""
      )

    print(var_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = var_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
    )

    # MSE
    mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "MSE",
        color = ""
      )

    print(mse_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_CUNIFORM_SBeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = mse_plot, width = 14, height = 8, dpi = 300
    )
  }
}





```




# C = Gamma
# S = Gamma

# as rate increaces the spread becomes small

## sD




```{r}



plot_data_gamma_gamma$n <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$n,
  levels = c(100, 500),
  labels = c("n = 100", "n = 500")
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("rho == -0.5", "rho == 0", "rho == 0.5")
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$ratec <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$ratec,
  levels = c(16, 8, 4, 2)
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$C_label <- factor(
  paste0("beta== ", plot_data_gamma_gamma$ratec),
  levels = c("beta== 16", "beta== 8", "beta== 4", "beta== 2")
)

plot_data_gamma_gamma$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_gamma_gamma$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_gamma_gamma$p1)) {
  for (nn in levels(plot_data_gamma_gamma$n)) {

    pd <- subset(plot_data_gamma_gamma, p1 == pp & n == nn)

    # Bias
    bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = label_parsed) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Bias",
        color = ""
      )

    print(bias_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = bias_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )

    # Variance
    var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = label_parsed) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Variance",
        color = ""
      )

    print(var_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = var_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )

    # MSE
    mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = label_parsed) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "MSE",
        color = ""
      )

    print(mse_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_CGAMMA_SGAMMA_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = mse_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )
  }
}





```





# S = Normal ()
# C = Beta(a,a)


## sd



```{r}


plot_data_norm_beta$n <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$n,
  levels = c(100, 500),
  labels = c("n = 100", "n = 500")
)

plot_data_norm_beta$rho <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$rho,
  levels = c(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
  labels = c("rho == -0.5", "rho == 0", "rho == 0.5")
)

plot_data_norm_beta$p1 <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$p1,
  levels = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)
)

plot_data_norm_beta$a <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$a,
  levels = c(20, 10, 3, 0.5)
)

plot_data_norm_beta$C_label <- factor(
  paste0("a = ", plot_data_norm_beta$a),
  levels = c("a = 20", "a = 10", "a = 3", "a = 0.5")
)

plot_data_norm_beta$estimator <- factor(
  plot_data_norm_beta$estimator,
  levels = c("dir", "dir_sd", "hat"),
  labels = c("Direct (clean)", "Direct + SD (under)", "IST kernel")
)

LINE_W <- 1.1

for (pp in levels(plot_data_norm_beta$p1)) {
  for (nn in levels(plot_data_norm_beta$n)) {

    pd <- subset(plot_data_norm_beta, p1 == pp & n == nn)

    # Bias
    bias_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = bias, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Bias",
        color = ""
      )

    print(bias_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Bias_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = bias_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )

    # Variance
    var_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = var, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "Variance",
        color = ""
      )

    print(var_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_Variance_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = var_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )

    # MSE
    mse_plot <- ggplot(pd, aes(x = s, y = mse, color = estimator)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = LINE_W) +
      facet_grid(rho ~ C_label, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(rho = label_parsed)) +
      theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "top"
      ) +
      labs(
        x = "s",
        y = "MSE",
        color = ""
      )

    print(mse_plot)
    ggsave(
      paste0("IST_KERNEL_MSE_Snorm_Cbeta_p1_", pp, "_", gsub(" = ", "", nn), ".png"),
      plot = mse_plot, width = 18, height = 10, dpi = 300
    )
  }
}






```
